name: VS Sound
description: Play sounds and trigger actions based on VS Code events and actions, among other things.

vssound.features.diagnostics.description: Play sounds when diagnostics include errors

vssound.features.tasks.description: Play sounds when tasks finish (success or failure)

vssound.features.save.description: Play a sound when the active editor document is saved

vssound.features.debug.description: Play sounds when a debug session starts or ends

vssound.features.terminal.description: Play sounds when a terminal is opened or when its shell exits

vssound.features.git.description: Play sounds for Git workspace events (HEAD, FETCH_HEAD, merge start)

vssound.diagnostics.edgeTriggerOnly.description: Play error sound only when the active file gains errors (or you switch to a file that already has errors), not on every diagnostic refresh while errors remain

vssound.volumePercent.description: Playback volume 0–100%. 0 = silent (skip). Applied where the player supports it (afplay, ffplay, mpv, Windows MCI). WAV via PowerShell and paplay/aplay may ignore this.

vssound.sounds.save.description: Audio file path when a workspace file is saved

vssound.sounds.debugStart.description: Audio file path when a debug session starts

vssound.sounds.debugEnd.description: Audio file path when a debug session ends

vssound.sounds.terminalOpen.description: Audio file path when a terminal is created

vssound.sounds.terminalExitSuccess.description: Audio file path when a terminal shell exits with code 0

vssound.sounds.terminalExitFailure.description: Audio file path when a terminal shell exits with a non-zero code

vssound.sounds.gitCommit.description: Audio file path when .git/HEAD changes (commit, checkout, merge, etc.)

vssound.sounds.gitMergeConflict.description: Audio file path when .git/MERGE_HEAD appears (merge/revert in progress)

vssound.sounds.error.description: Audio file path when diagnostics include errors

vssound.sounds.buildFailure.description: Audio file path when a task process exits with non-zero code

vssound.sounds.buildSuccess.description: Audio file path when a task process exits with code 0

vssound.sounds.test.description: Audio file path for the Play Test Sound command

vssound.cooldown.errorMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between diagnostic error sounds (0 = no limit)

vssound.cooldown.buildSuccessMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between task success sounds (0 = no limit)

vssound.cooldown.buildFailureMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between task failure sounds (0 = no limit)

vssound.cooldown.terminalMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between terminal open/exit sounds (0 = no limit)

vssound.cooldown.saveMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between save sounds (0 = no limit)

vssound.cooldown.debugMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between debug start/end sounds (0 = no limit)

vssound.cooldown.gitMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between Git-triggered sounds (0 = no limit)

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun build ./src/extension.ts --outfile=./dist/extension.js --target=node --format=cjs --external vscode
